about_quotes.speaker: Neal Caine
about_quotes.evidence: I’m very pleased to have Neal Caine here, bassist and, you just got a big compliment from David Torkanowsky about a Frank Sinatra 100th birthday observance, a big band. And he said you really kicked some butt with your bass that night.
